text: {"matches":[{"type":"narrower","fromIndex":1,"toIndex":0,"rationale":"Claim 1 reports a specific cohort of women in the Nurses' Health Study, whereas claim 0 refers to several large prospective cohorts in general."},{"type":"compatible-different-scope","fromIndex":2,"toIndex":0,"rationale":"Claim 2 is a randomized trial of a Mediterranean diet with nuts, while claim 0 describes observational associations across cohorts; both can be true but address different study designs."},{"type":"compatible-different-scope","fromIndex":3,"toIndex":2,"rationale":"Claim 3 comments on the methodological re‑analysis of the PREDIMED trial, not on the effect size itself, so it is compatible with the risk‑reduction result in claim 2 but concerns a different aspect."},{"type":"compatible-different-scope","fromIndex":5,"toIndex":4,"rationale":"Claim 5 advises accounting for total calories when recommending nuts, which relates to the fact stated in claim 4 that nuts are energy‑dense; the scopes differ (recommendation vs property)."}]}
